title: sium annuum
intro: Sium annuum, also known as water parsnip, is a perennial aquatic plant that grows in shallow water environments. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sium annuum include treating digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as reducing fever and alleviating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Sium annuum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
